title: stelis angustifolia
intro: Stelis angustifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Stelis angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for promoting overall well-being.
